items.title: You may have seen some pictures of Jenny Boucek and Jim Boylen with Ivica Zubac overseas. Zubac is on the Croatia squad for the upcoming FIBA World Cup 2027 qualifying window. They play Italy in a friendly on June 24, the competition starts in early July.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: You may have seen some pictures of Jenny Boucek and Jim Boylen with Ivica Zubac overseas. Zubac is on the Croatia squad for the upcoming FIBA World Cup 2027 qualifying window. They play Italy in a friendly on June 24, the competition starts in early July.

items.title: Are the Pacers convinced that Jay Huff and Micah Potter are the answers at the center spot behind Zubac?
items.author: Alex Golden
items.body_excerpt:
Are the Pacers convinced that Jay Huff and Micah Potter are the answers at the center spot behind Zubac? 

Here are 5 centers that I think the Pacers should consider in Free Agency to compete with Huff & Potter to be Bug Zu’s backup.

items.title: Ivica Zubac is extension eligible this summer, which means the Pacers could add an additional three years to Big Zu’s contract.
items.author: Alex Golden
items.body_excerpt:
Ivica Zubac is extension eligible this summer, which means the Pacers could add an additional three years to Big Zu’s contract. 

The max extension Zubac can sign is a 3 year deal for roughly $95M — but should the Pacers do it? 

My latest👇
www.si.com/nba/pacers/o...
